title: Contribute to the Archive
subtitle: Help us honor and preserve the memory of the martyrs
shareInfoText: If you have biographical information, stories, or details about any of the martyrs, please share them with us. Every piece of information helps us create a more complete and accurate historical record.
submitMediaText: We are collecting photographs and videos that capture the lives and spirits of the martyrs. These visual memories are invaluable in keeping their legacies alive and providing a human connection to their stories.
shareStoriesText: Personal stories, memories, and testimonials from family members and friends help humanize the archive and remind us of the real people behind each profile. Your memories matter.
guideline1: Ensure all information is accurate and verified when possible
guideline2: Photos should be high quality and respectful in nature
guideline3: Include dates, full names, and context for all submissions
guideline4: Obtain permission from family members when sharing personal content
guideline5: Provide biographical information in both English and Arabic when possible
reviewMessage: We review all submissions carefully and with the utmost respect. Thank you for helping us preserve these important memories.
noticeText: All submissions become part of the permanent historical archive. By contributing, you help ensure these stories are never forgotten.
bottomCTA: Your contribution, no matter how small, helps preserve the memory and honor the sacrifice of the martyrs of the Sudanese Revolution.
togetherMessage: Together, we ensure their sacrifice is never forgotten.
